ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application (e.g., Browser, News Service) */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the application */,
  "app_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application being monitored */,
  "time_cp" TEXT /* Time taken to process requests */,
  "network_traffic" TEXT /* Amount of data transferred over the network */,
  "traffic_usage" TEXT /* Traffic usage for the application */,
  "tiles_update" TEXT /* Data usage for tiles updates */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Response time of the application */,
  "throughput" TEXT /* Throughput of the application */,
  "error_rate" TEXT /* Error rate of the application */,
  "user_count" INTEGER /* Number of users interacting with the application */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the server or user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for client support */,
  "client_website" TEXT /* URL of the client's website */,
  "client_industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_applications" (
  "client_app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client-application mapping */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application being used by the client */,
  "app_usage" TEXT /* Frequency of application usage by the client */,
  "app_importance" TEXT /* Importance level of the application to the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_applications_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_applications_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application generating the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "alert_resolution" TEXT /* Detailed resolution steps or actions taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the application */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application being reported on */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Time period covered by the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Contents of the report in text or JSON format */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)
